notes: The gating eval (eval 1) is credit-free and deterministic: it runs Stage Q over recorded free-signal fixtures and scores against gold labels. NO eval may issue a live, credit-costing apollo_people_match call. Eval 2 is a credit-free dry-run that checks the skill plans qualify-before-enrich and the compliance wall without executing Apollo.

evals.name: qualification-gate-fixtures
evals.prompt: Using the find-cold-leads skill, apply Stage Q (qualification) to every candidate in evals/qualification_fixtures.json. Each fixture is a free-signal record (a masked Apollo free-search result or a SERP snippet) plus a `web_intent` field that tells you what a free web lookup on the company name would surface — treat `web_intent` as the result of that free lookup (do NOT do live searches, do NOT call Apollo). For each fixture decide a tier: 'strong', 'possible', or 'reject'. Write your decisions to evals/predictions.json as a JSON object mapping each fixture id to its tier. Then run `python evals/score_qualification.py evals/predictions.json` and report the result.
evals.expected_output: predictions.json mapping all 24 ids to tiers; score_qualification.py reports passed=true with reject_recall==1.0 and fit_recall>=0.8 (every data-vendor/blog-title/off-ICP fixture rejected; the §1 regression rows neg-storchenwiege-blogtitle, neg-zoominfo-directory, neg-zoominfo-snippet-contact all 'reject').

assertions.text: predictions.json exists and labels all 24 fixtures
the three named §1 regression rows are all predicted 'reject'

evals.name: plan-respects-credit-and-compliance
evals.prompt: I have the Apollo MCP connected with about 25 lead credits left. I want ~10 German furniture-manufacturer leads for ClimatePoint. Before you spend a single credit, walk me through exactly how you'll do this.
evals.expected_output: A plan that (a) qualifies on FREE signals before any enrichment, (b) respects a credit budget (~25) and enriches only top-tier qualified rows, (c) tags region from the search filter and applies the EU/Germany compliance wall (needs review, not send-ready), and (d) hands the output to climatepoint-contact-intelligence for scoring. It must NOT call apollo_people_match during this planning answer.

assertions.text: states qualification happens on free signals BEFORE enrichment
respects a credit budget and enriches only qualified (strong/possible) rows
applies region-aware compliance: Germany/EU rows are review-gated, not send-ready
hands off to climatepoint-contact-intelligence for persona/lead-score (does not score here)
does NOT issue a live apollo_people_match (no credit spent during planning)
